summary: Production Plan Excel Upload feature testing completed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified and working correctly. The upload endpoint supports three modes (check, add, override) with FIFO allocation, capacity conflict detection, and Excel result report generation.
critical_code_review_comments: All 15 backend API tests passed - Production Plan Upload feature fully functional
POST /api/cpc/production-plan/upload-excel (mode=check) - Returns JSON warning when conflicts exist with existing schedules
POST /api/cpc/production-plan/upload-excel?mode=add - Allocates within remaining capacity, returns Excel with results
POST /api/cpc/production-plan/upload-excel?mode=override - Clears existing schedules for conflicting dates, allocates fresh
Excel result file contains all required columns: Status, Allocated, Not Allocated, Schedule Code, Remarks
FIFO allocation working correctly - first rows get full allocation before later rows
Partial allocation shows correct allocated/not_allocated counts when capacity exceeded
Schedule codes generated correctly (PS_YYYYMM_XXXX format) for SCHEDULED/PARTIAL rows
Invalid branch/SKU validation working - returns ERROR status in Excel
Missing columns validation working - returns 400 error
Invalid file format validation working - returns 400 error
X-Upload-Summary header contains JSON stats (total_rows, scheduled, partial, rejected, errors, total_allocated, total_not_allocated)
Frontend: CPC page loads correctly with 3 tabs (Production Planning, Branch Capacity, Production Schedule)
Frontend: Upload Plan, Download Template, Capacity Report buttons have proper data-testid attributes
Frontend: Branch Capacity tab shows 8 branches with capacity, utilization, and available units
Frontend: Production Schedule tab shows branch-wise schedules with filters (date range, branch)
Frontend: Conflict dialog code present in CPC.js (lines 1059-1232) for handling capacity conflicts
seed_data_creation: Test schedules created during testing with SKU FC_KS_BE_115 and branch BR_001 (Unit 1 Vedica)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Plan Excel Upload feature fully tested. Key verifications: 1) POST /api/cpc/production-plan/upload-excel supports 3 modes: check (default), add, override. 2) Check mode returns JSON warning with conflicts array when existing schedules + new demand exceeds capacity. 3) Add mode allocates within remaining capacity with FIFO order. 4) Override mode clears existing schedules for conflicting date/branch combos. 5) Excel result has columns: Branch ID, Date, Buyer SKU ID, Quantity, Status, Allocated, Not Allocated, Schedule Code, Remarks. 6) Status values: SCHEDULED (full), PARTIAL (capacity limit), REJECTED (no capacity), ERROR (validation). 7) X-Upload-Summary header contains JSON stats. 8) Frontend CPC page has conflict dialog (showConflictDialog state) that appears when check mode returns warning. 9) Valid test SKU: FC_KS_BE_115, Valid branch: BR_001 (Unit 1 Vedica, capacity 1000).

backend_api.GET /api/branches/reference: PASS - Returns branch list with IDs
backend_api.POST /api/cpc/production-plan/upload-exc: PASS - Returns Excel with ERROR status
PASS - Returns Excel with ERROR status
PASS - Clears existing and allocates fresh
